mandatory_clauses.name: Parties Identification
mandatory_clauses.description: Clear identification of all parties entering into the contract

mandatory_clauses.name: Consideration
mandatory_clauses.description: Specification of what each party will give or receive (Indian Contract Act, 1872 - Section 10)

mandatory_clauses.name: Termination Clause
mandatory_clauses.description: Conditions and procedures for ending the contract

mandatory_clauses.name: Dispute Resolution
mandatory_clauses.description: Mechanism for resolving disputes (arbitration, mediation, or court jurisdiction)

mandatory_clauses.name: Governing Law
mandatory_clauses.description: Specification of which jurisdiction's laws will govern the contract

mandatory_clauses.name: Signatures
mandatory_clauses.description: Signatures of all parties or authorized representatives

recommended_clauses.name: Confidentiality
recommended_clauses.description: Protection of sensitive information shared between parties

recommended_clauses.name: Liability Limitation
recommended_clauses.description: Limits on liability for each party

recommended_clauses.name: Force Majeure
recommended_clauses.description: Provisions for unforeseen circumstances beyond parties' control

recommended_clauses.name: Notice Provisions
recommended_clauses.description: How parties will communicate official notices

optional_clauses.name: Intellectual Property Rights
optional_clauses.description: Ownership and usage rights for intellectual property

optional_clauses.name: Non-Compete
optional_clauses.description: Restrictions on competing activities (subject to Indian Contract Act Section 27)

optional_clauses.name: Warranty
optional_clauses.description: Guarantees or assurances provided by parties

optional_clauses.name: Severability
optional_clauses.description: Ensures contract remains valid even if some provisions are unenforceable
